app.title: ORIM
app.dataExportDescription: Download all your boards in their folder structure and all uploaded images as a ZIP file.

auth.microsoftLoginError: Microsoft sign-in could not be completed.
auth.googleLoginError: Google sign-in could not be completed.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.displayNameHint: This is the name shown for you in ORIM.
profile.profileUpdateFailed: Display name could not be updated.
profile.loadFailed: The profile could not be loaded.

dashboard.searchNoResults: No boards match your search yet.
dashboard.emptyStateTitle: Start with a board your team can use right away.
dashboard.emptyStateDescription: Use a guided starter board, begin from scratch, or import an existing board. ORIM works best when the first action is obvious.
dashboard.guidedStartDescription: A starter board that teaches drawing, moving, and sharing in under a minute.
dashboard.blankStartDescription: Open a clean board when you already know what you want to sketch.
dashboard.onboardingTitle: Get your first board working fast
dashboard.onboardingDescription: Create a starter board with guided steps, choose a blank canvas, or jump straight into templates. Pick the path that gets your team to value fastest.
dashboard.onboardingValue1: Guided starter boards teach the ORIM interaction model directly in the canvas.
dashboard.onboardingValue2: Templates help teams skip setup and get to collaboration sooner.
dashboard.onboardingValue3: Private-by-default sharing keeps the first experience safe.
dashboard.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this board?
dashboard.deleteFolderConfirm: Delete this folder? Boards inside will be moved out.
dashboard.deleteFolderOnlyHint: Boards are moved out of the folder.
dashboard.deleteFolderAndBoardsHint: All boards in this folder will be permanently deleted.
dashboard.conflictRemoteApplied: Your edit conflicted with a remote change. Remote version applied.
dashboard.deleteFolderConfirmNameHint: Enter the folder name to delete the folder and all its boards

board.undoConflict: Undo could not be applied safely because the affected elements changed in the meantime.
board.redoConflict: Redo could not be applied because the board changed after the original action.
board.snapshotDialogHint: Restoring a snapshot replaces the current board and clears the local undo history.
board.snapshotCreateFailed: The snapshot could not be created.
board.snapshotRestoreFailed: The snapshot could not be restored.
board.snapshotRestoreDescription: Restore "{{name}}"? This replaces the current board content.

boardSettings.title: Board settings
boardSettings.boardThemeDescription: Applies a shared theme for everyone on the board. Leave empty to let each user keep their personal theme.
boardSettings.canvasBackgroundDescription: Applies a shared canvas background color for everyone on the board, independent of their personal theme.
boardSettings.iconGroupsDescription: Controls which icon categories are shown as toolbar shortcuts for this board. The dialog still shows all icons.
boardSettings.description: Choose which sticky note variants are available in the toolbar for this board.
boardSettings.atLeastOnePreset: At least one preset is required.

tools.iconBrowseHint: Top picks from the full catalog, use search to narrow further

activities.label: Activities
activities.description: Sports, leisure, outdoor, and activity icons.

android.label: Android
android.description: Android, mobile platforms, and device state.

household.label: Household
household.description: Household, kitchen, cleaning, and everyday items.

images.label: Images
images.description: Images, photos, gallery, and creative tools.

travel.label: Travel
travel.description: Travel, vacation, flights, and being on the move.

uiActions.label: UI actions
uiActions.description: Menus, search, filtering, layout, and interactions.

sharing.privateDescription: Only you and explicitly shared members can access this board. A share link does not work in this mode.
sharing.publicDescription: Anyone with the share link can open this board. Use this mode when link access should work. You can optionally allow anonymous editing.
sharing.sharedDescription: Only explicitly invited ORIM members can access this board. The share link stays inactive in this mode.
sharing.shareLinkPublicHint: The share link is active because visibility is set to "Public link".
sharing.shareLinkPrivateHint: This board is currently not reachable through the share link because visibility is set to "Private". Switch to "Public link" if the link should work.
sharing.shareLinkSharedHint: This board is currently not reachable through the share link because visibility is set to "Members only". Invite users below or switch to "Public link".
sharing.passwordHint: Password protection only applies to public share links.
sharing.allowEditingHint: This option only applies when visibility is "Public link".
sharing.memberAddFailed: The member could not be added.
sharing.memberRemoveFailed: The member could not be removed.
sharing.memberRoleUpdateFailed: The member role could not be updated.
sharing.searchUsersFailed: The user list could not be loaded.
sharing.sharedMembersHint: Use "Members only" when only invited ORIM users should get access.
sharing.guestDisplayNameHint: You are currently anonymous and can change the name other participants see.
sharing.guestDisplayNameSaved: Your displayed name has been updated.

comments.title: Comments
comments.pickLocationActive: Click on the board to place your comment
comments.readOnlyHint: Comments are visible here, but only board members with edit rights can add new ones.
comments.commentPlaceholder: Add context, feedback, or a review note...

a11y.canvasKeyboardHint: Use Tab and Shift+Tab to move between elements, Enter to edit selected text, and Escape to clear the selection.
a11y.commentPlacementActive: Comment placement is active. Click on the board to choose a location.

assistant.title: AI Assistant
assistant.emptyState: Describe a diagram and the assistant will create it for you.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.description: The main whiteboard actions are available directly from the keyboard, trackpad, and temporary gestures.
shortcuts.constrainShapeProportions: Draw or resize shapes with locked proportions (square/circle)
shortcuts.clearSelection: Clear selection and return to the select tool
shortcuts.temporaryPan: Temporarily pan without switching the active tool
shortcuts.trackpadPan: Pan the board with two-finger scrolling
shortcuts.trackpadZoom: Zoom the board with a pinch gesture

admin.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?
admin.createFailed: The user could not be created.
admin.updateFailed: The user could not be updated.
admin.passwordChangeFailed: The password could not be changed.
admin.deactivateFailed: The user could not be deactivated.
admin.activateFailed: The user could not be activated.
admin.deleteFailed: The user could not be deleted.
admin.loadFailed: The users could not be loaded.
admin.cannotDeactivateSelf: You cannot deactivate your own account.
admin.settingsDescription: Manage core ORIM settings such as themes and the integrated AI assistant.
admin.assistantManagementDescription: Enable or disable the diagram assistant and provide the OpenAI SDK runtime credentials used by the application.
admin.assistantApiKeyStoredHint: An API key is already stored. Leave the field empty to keep the current key.
admin.assistantApiKeyMissingHint: No API key is stored yet. A valid key is required before the assistant can be enabled.
admin.assistantSettingsLoadFailed: AI assistant settings could not be loaded.
admin.assistantSettingsSaveFailed: AI assistant settings could not be saved.
admin.themeManagementDescription: Manage the themes available in ORIM, upload or download JSON files, and enable the variants that should be offered to users.
admin.themeUploadReplaceHint: Uploading a theme with the same key replaces an existing editable theme.
admin.themeImmutableHint: The built-in Light, Dark, and Synthwave themes are protected and cannot be deleted or overwritten. They can still be disabled.
admin.themeDeleteConfirmation: Do you really want to delete the theme "{{name}}"?
admin.themeUploadFailed: The theme could not be uploaded.
admin.themeUpdateFailed: The theme could not be updated.
admin.themeDeleteFailed: The theme could not be deleted.
admin.deploymentReadinessDescription: Review the operational signals that matter for a secure internal-collaboration pilot before you invite design partners.
admin.deploymentReadinessLoadFailed: Deployment readiness could not be loaded.
admin.readinessDatabaseReady: The API can reach the configured database provider ({{provider}}).
admin.readinessDatabaseAttention: The API cannot currently reach the configured database provider ({{provider}}). Fix connectivity before onboarding pilot users.
admin.readinessMigrationsReady: No pending EF Core migrations were detected.
admin.readinessMigrationsAttention: {{count}} pending migration(s) still need to be applied before a stable beta rollout.
admin.readinessMigrationsNotApplicable: The current database provider is non-relational, so migration drift checks are not applicable in this environment.
admin.readinessTransportReady: HTTPS redirection is enabled and HSTS is active for non-development environments.
admin.readinessTransportAttention: This environment is still running without production-grade HSTS protection. Move the pilot to a non-development deployment.
admin.readinessOperationsReady: Request IDs, rate limiting, and health probes are available. Health endpoints: {{liveEndpoint}} and {{readyEndpoint}}.
admin.readinessOperationsAttention: Operational safeguards are incomplete. Confirm request tracing, rate limiting, and health probes before the pilot.
admin.readinessAuthReady: Browser sessions use httpOnly cookies, reducing token exposure in client-side scripts.
admin.readinessAuthAttention: Secure cookie-based sessions are not active. Fix authentication handling before a pilot launch.
admin.readinessSsoReady: {{count}} enterprise SSO provider(s) are configured for this deployment.
admin.readinessSsoAttention: No Microsoft Entra or Google SSO provider is configured yet. Local auth still works, but enterprise pilots usually expect SSO.
admin.readinessAssistantReady: The assistant is enabled and fully configured for this deployment.
admin.readinessAssistantAttention: The assistant is enabled but not fully configured yet.
admin.readinessAssistantDisabled: The assistant is currently disabled. This is acceptable for pilots focused on core collaboration.
admin.readinessThemesReady: {{enabled}} of {{total}} theme(s) are enabled for end users.
admin.readinessThemesAttention: No enabled themes are currently available to users.

templates.TemplateWelcomeDescription: Learn the core ORIM actions directly on a ready-made board.
templates.TemplateProcessDescription: Template for workflows and process steps.
templates.TemplateWorkshopDescription: Collect goals, ideas, risks, and next steps.
